task_completion.description: Open the draft document in LibreOffice Writer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: LibreOffice Writer window is visible displaying the document 'structural_analysis_draft.odt'.

task_completion.description: Remove manual empty paragraphs used for vertical spacing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Agent deletes empty lines manually or uses Find & Replace to remove empty paragraphs. The document should visually show fewer large vertical gaps between text blocks.

task_completion.description: Update 'Heading 1' and 'Heading 2' styles to stay with the following paragraph.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Paragraph Style' dialog for 'Heading 1' and 'Heading 2' is opened. In the 'Text Flow' tab, the 'Keep with next paragraph' option is checked.

task_completion.description: Configure 'Text Body' style for widow and orphan control.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Paragraph Style' dialog for 'Text Body' is opened. In the 'Text Flow' tab, both 'Orphan control' and 'Widow control' are checked and set to at least 2 lines.

task_completion.description: Configure 'Text Body' style for spacing below paragraph.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Paragraph Style' dialog for 'Text Body' is opened. In the 'Indents & Spacing' tab, the 'Below paragraph' spacing is set to 0.10" or 0.25cm.
The 'Save As' dialog is used to save the file as 'structural_analysis_final.odt' in the Documents folder, or the LibreOffice title bar updates to show this new filename.

integrity.description: Agent used the LibreOffice Writer GUI to edit the document and styles.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with LibreOffice menus, dialogs, and the style sidebar, rather than terminal commands or scripts modifying the file.

integrity.description: Agent modified the actual styles rather than applying direct formatting.
integrity.visual_evidence: Changes are made through the 'Paragraph Style' dialogs accessed via the Styles sidebar or right-clicking and selecting 'Edit Style', not just using the top toolbar buttons on selected text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires modifying the actual Paragraph Styles (Heading 1, Heading 2, Text Body) in LibreOffice Writer, not just applying direct formatting. In the Paragraph Style dialog -> Text Flow tab, 'Keep with next paragraph' must be checked for both heading styles, and Widow/Orphan control set to >= 2 lines for Text Body. In the Indents & Spacing tab, 'Below paragraph' must be 0.10 inches or 0.25cm for Text Body. The original document contains approximately 40 empty paragraphs that must be removed.
